title: Make advanced filter bigger or scroll-able through selected column options
excerpt: There are times when I am filtering through a lot of things, many times applying several filters from one column. However, I can’t seem to scroll or see all the selected options in the column I filtered. This becomes ver…

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are times when I am filtering through a lot of things, many times applying several filters from one column. However, I can’t seem to scroll or see all the selected options in the column I filtered. This becomes very difficult and I need to start over sometimes.

Screenshot 2025-01-26 at 12.32.59579×212 14.3 KB
